title: Release Package Script Settings
description: maksit-certs-ui: container images (Web API + Web UI) and Helm chart to OCI. No NuGet packages or zip archives. ReleasePublishGuard (before Docker/Helm) controls allowed branches and tag rules; publish plugins omit branches. Engine aligned with maksit-repoutils.

plugins.name: Plugin module file name in CorePlugins (for example, DockerPush -> CorePlugins/DockerPush.psm1).
plugins.stageLabel: Execution phase: test, qualityGate, build, or release (lowercase). continueOnError is true only for release.
plugins.enabled: If true, the plugin is imported and Invoke-Plugin is called in the configured order.
plugins.DotNetReleaseVersion: Reads <Version> from the first projectFiles entry; ReleasePublishGuard checks tag on HEAD matches when tagVersionMustMatchDotNetRelease is true.
plugins.projects: DotNetTest: array of test project paths relative to Release-Package. Requires utils/TestRunner.psm1 (multi-project Cobertura aggregation).
plugins.resultsDir: DotNetTest: optional; when multiple projects are listed, TestRunner uses Release-Package/TestResults if omitted.
plugins.projectFiles: QualityGate: add .csproj paths when scanVulnerabilities is true (dotnet list package --vulnerable).
plugins.scanVulnerabilities: QualityGate: false = no dotnet list; true requires projectFiles. failOnVulnerabilities optional when scan is true (default true).
plugins.coverageThreshold: QualityGate: >0 requires line % on shared context (qualityLineCoverage, coverageLineRate, or testResult.LineRate). 0 disables.
plugins.credentialsEnvVar: DockerPush / HelmPush: env var with base64(username:password).
plugins.contextPath: DockerPush: directory containing MaksIT.CertsUI and MaksIT.WebUI (repo src/).
plugins.images: Dockerfile paths are relative to contextPath.
plugins.chartPath: HelmPush: directory containing Chart.yaml. Keep version/appVersion as placeholders in git (e.g. 0.0.0); HelmPush overwrites with bare semver from DotNetReleaseVersion (shared.version, e.g. 3.3.4, no v) before package/push; falls back to stripping v from shared.tag if version is missing.
plugins.ociRepository: HelmPush: OCI registry URL for helm push (e.g. oci://cr.maks-it.com/charts).
plugins.pushLatest: Docker: also push :latest (images also get bare :3.3.4 and :v3.3.4 from DotNetReleaseVersion). Helm: oras copy chart to :latest (requires oras on PATH).
plugins.branches: ReleasePublishGuard: allowed branches for publish (omit or ["*"] = any). Do not put branches on DockerPush/HelmPush/GitHub/DotNetNuGet.
plugins.tagVersionMustMatchDotNetRelease: ReleasePublishGuard: tag semver must equal DotNetReleaseVersion when true.
plugins.whenRequirementsNotMet: ReleasePublishGuard: skip (suppress publish plugins) or fail (exit 1).
plugins.requireCleanWorkingTree: ReleasePublishGuard: block publish if git status is not clean.
plugins.ensureTagOnRemote: ReleasePublishGuard: push tag to remoteName if missing.
plugins.remoteName: ReleasePublishGuard: git remote for tag push (default origin).
